    "Missing nip-point guards on the active conveyor system, exposing workers to severe entanglement and crushing hazards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately lock out and tag out (LOTO) the conveyor system to halt operations.",
    "Install compliant physical guards over all exposed nip-points and rotating parts before resuming work."

  "rationale": "Operating a conveyor system without nip-point guards during active production poses an immediate, critical risk of severe injury or amputation to personnel, violating basic OSHA and CEMA safety standards.",
